Uses of Class
com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.tool.BaseClass

  • Packages that use BaseClass 
    Package Description
    com.enovka.gemini4j.client.imp
    Provides implementations for the GeminiClient interface.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.client.spec
    Provides specifications and interfaces for the Gemini client.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.response
    Provides classes representing responses from the Gemini API.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.http.impl
    Provides implementations for the HttpClient interface.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.http.spec
    Provides specifications and interfaces for the HTTP client.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.json.impl
    Provides implementations for the JsonService interface.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.json.spec
    Provides specifications and interfaces for the JSON service.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.tool
    Provides common utilities and base classes for the Gemini4J library.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.impl
    Provides implementations for Gemini API resource interfaces.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.spec
    Provides specifications and interfaces for Gemini API resources.

    • Uses of BaseClass in com.enovka.gemini4j.client.imp

      Subclasses of BaseClass in com.enovka.gemini4j.client.imp 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  GeminiClientImp
      Implementation of the GeminiClient interface.

    • Uses of BaseClass in com.enovka.gemini4j.client.spec

      Subclasses of BaseClass in com.enovka.gemini4j.client.spec 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  AbstractGeminiClient
      Abstract base class for Gemini client implementations, providing shared functionality.

    • Uses of BaseClass in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.response

      Subclasses of BaseClass in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.response 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  GeminiResult
      Represents a result from the Gemini API, providing both the raw GenerateContentResponse and convenient shortcuts for accessing common data.

    • Uses of BaseClass in com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.http.impl

      Subclasses of BaseClass in com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.http.impl 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  CustomHttpClient
      Custom HTTP client implementation that wraps a user-provided HttpClient.
      class  DefaultHttpClient
      Default implementation of the HttpClient interface using Apache HttpClient.

    • Uses of BaseClass in com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.http.spec

      Subclasses of BaseClass in com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.http.spec 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  AbstractHttpClient
      Abstract base class for HTTP client implementations, providing common functionality.

    • Uses of BaseClass in com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.json.impl

      Subclasses of BaseClass in com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.json.impl 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  AbstractJsonService
      Abstract base class for JSON serialization and deserialization implementations.
      class  JacksonJsonService
      Default implementation of the JsonService interface using Jackson.

    • Uses of BaseClass in com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.json.spec

      Subclasses of BaseClass in com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.json.spec 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  AbstractJsonService
      Abstract base class for JSON serialization and deserialization implementations.

    • Uses of BaseClass in com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.tool

      Subclasses of BaseClass in com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.tool 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  ModelTool
      Singleton class that manages a list of available Gemini models.

    • Uses of BaseClass in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.impl

      Subclasses of BaseClass in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.impl 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  EmbedResourceImpl
      Implementation of the EmbedResource interface for interacting with the embedding resource of the Gemini API.
      class  GenerationResourceImpl
      Implementation of the GenerationResource interface for interacting with the Generation resource of the Gemini API.
      class  ModelResourceImpl
      Implementation of the ModelResource interface for interacting with the Model resource of the Gemini API.

    • Uses of BaseClass in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.spec

      Subclasses of BaseClass in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.spec 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  AbstractResource
      Abstract base class for resource implementations, providing shared functionality.
